text.title: Tech Debt Sprint Template Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when applying Tech Debt Sprint Template. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent invents inputs that were not actually consulted — e.g., 'as documented in the runbook' with no runbook citation.
antipattern.root-cause: inputs_used is empty OR contains entries without verifiable source path/URL
antipattern.fix: Reject. Re-run with explicit input list pinned in context; refuse to synthesize from prior knowledge.

antipattern.symptom: Owner field collapses to 'team' / 'engineering' / 'we' under pressure.
antipattern.fix: Block output. Surface the gap; require a named human or named role-with-rotation.

antipattern.symptom: Rationale is post-hoc justification — written to defend the decision rather than explain it.
antipattern.root-cause: rationale contains defensive phrases ('obviously', 'clearly', 'as we all know') AND no input citations
antipattern.fix: Re-write rationale referencing at least one specific input value or constraint.

antipattern.symptom: Version frozen at 1.0.0 forever; last_reviewed never advances even after material change.
antipattern.root-cause: decision changed since the previous record AND version == previous_version
antipattern.fix: Bump version (patch for typo, minor for new input, major for changed decision). Update last_reviewed.

antipattern.symptom: Scope creep: agent applies Tech Debt Sprint Template to a problem that should run a different methodology in the dev domain.
antipattern.root-cause: decision content matches a closely-adjacent methodology's output shape better than this one's
antipattern.fix: Route to the correct methodology; emit a 'wrong-tool' note in the artefact's notes field.

antipattern.symptom: Hallucinated input citation — agent fabricates source paths or URLs that don't resolve.
antipattern.root-cause: any inputs_used entry returns 404 / file-not-found / lacks repo path
antipattern.fix: Reject all unverified citations; re-run with operator-supplied real refs only.
